inputs.name: accessibilityAttributes
inputs.description:
Defines the additional accessibility attributes that will be applied to the component.
The following fields are supported:

- **ariaSetsize**: Defines the number of items in the current set  when not all items in the set are present in the DOM.
*Note:** The value is an integer reflecting the number of items in the complete set. If the size of the entire set is unknown, set `-1`.

- **ariaPosinset**: Defines an element's number or position in the current set when not all items are present in the DOM.
*Note:** The value is an integer greater than or equal to 1, and less than or equal to the size of the set when that size is known.

inputs.name: accessibleName
inputs.description:
Defines the text alternative of the component.
Note: If not provided a default text alternative will be set, if present.

inputs.name: additionalText
inputs.description: Defines the `additionalText`, displayed in the end of the list item.

inputs.name: additionalTextState
inputs.description:
Defines the state of the `additionalText`.

Available options are: `"None"` (by default), `"Positive"`, `"Critical"`, `"Information"` and `"Negative"`.

inputs.name: description
inputs.description: Defines the description displayed right under the item text, if such is present.

inputs.name: highlight
inputs.description:
Defines the highlight state of the list items.
Available options are: `"None"` (by default), `"Positive"`, `"Critical"`, `"Information"` and `"Negative"`.

inputs.name: icon
inputs.description:
Defines the `icon` source URI.

*Note:**
SAP-icons font provides numerous built-in icons. To find all the available icons, see the
[Icon Explorer](https://sdk.openui5.org/test-resources/sap/m/demokit/iconExplorer/webapp/index.html).

inputs.name: iconEnd
inputs.description: Defines whether the `icon` should be displayed in the beginning of the list item or in the end.

inputs.name: movable
inputs.description: Defines whether the item is movable.

inputs.name: navigated
inputs.description:
The navigated state of the list item.
If set to `true`, a navigation indicator is displayed at the end of the list item.

inputs.name: selected
inputs.description: Defines the selected state of the component.

inputs.name: text
inputs.description: Defines the text of the component.

inputs.name: tooltip
inputs.description: Defines the text of the tooltip that would be displayed for the list item.

inputs.name: type
inputs.description:
Defines the visual indication and behavior of the list items.
Available options are `Active` (by default), `Inactive`, `Detail` and `Navigation`.

*Note:** When set to `Active` or `Navigation`, the item will provide visual response upon press and hover,
while with type `Inactive` and `Detail` - will not.

inputs.name: wrappingType
inputs.description:
Defines if the text of the component should wrap when it's too long. When set to "Normal", the content (title, description) will be wrapped using the `ui5-expandable-text` component.
The text can wrap up to 100 characters on small screens (size S) and up to 300 characters on larger screens (size M and above). When text exceeds these limits, it truncates with an ellipsis followed by a text expansion trigger. Available options are: - `None` (default) - The text will truncate with an ellipsis. - `Normal` - The text will wrap (without truncation).

outputs.name: ui5DetailClick
outputs.description: Fired when the user clicks on the detail button when type is `Detail`.
